languages.text: "Если ты забываешь настоящего Нунциуса, то почему все равно ищешь способ его спасти?"
"If you keep forgetting the real Nuncius, why do you still seek a way to save him?"
languages.original_text: "Если ты забываешь настоящего Нунциуса, то почему все равно ищешь способ его спасти?"

traits.locale_text: "If you keep forgetting the real Nuncius, why do you still seek a way to save him?"
"If you keep forgetting the real Nuncius, why do you still seek a way to save him?"
"If you keep forgetting the real Nuncius, why do you still seek a way to save him?"
"If you keep forgetting the real Nuncius, why do you still seek a way to save him?"

languages.text: «Si olvida constantemente al Nuncius real, ¿por qué sigue buscando la forma de salvarlo?».
languages.original_text: "If you keep forgetting the real Nuncius, why do you still seek a way to save him?"

traits.locale_text: «Si olvida constantemente al Nuncius real, ¿por qué sigue buscando la forma de salvarlo?».

languages.text: “既然你连真正的努恩修斯是什么样都记不清，那为什么还要想办法去救他？”
languages.original_text: "If you keep forgetting the real Nuncius, why do you still seek a way to save him?"

traits.locale_text: “既然你连真正的努恩修斯是什么样都记不清，那为什么还要想办法去救他？”

languages.text: « Si vous oubliez continuellement le véritable Nuncius, comment se fait-il que vous cherchiez toujours un moyen de le sauver ? »
languages.original_text: "If you keep forgetting the real Nuncius, why do you still seek a way to save him?"

traits.locale_text: « Si vous oubliez continuellement le véritable Nuncius, comment se fait-il que vous cherchiez toujours un moyen de le sauver ? »

languages.text: "Gerçek Nunciu'u unutuyorsan neden hâlâ onu kurtarmanın yolunu arıyorsun?"
languages.original_text: "If you keep forgetting the real Nuncius, why do you still seek a way to save him?"

traits.locale_text: "Gerçek Nunciu'u unutuyorsan neden hâlâ onu kurtarmanın yolunu arıyorsun?"

languages.text: "Wenn Ihr den echten Nuncius immer wieder vergesst, warum sucht Ihr dann einen Weg, ihn zu retten?"
languages.original_text: "If you keep forgetting the real Nuncius, why do you still seek a way to save him?"

traits.locale_text: "Wenn Ihr den echten Nuncius immer wieder vergesst, warum sucht Ihr dann einen Weg, ihn zu retten?"

languages.text: 「ヌンキウスに関する情報を記憶から消しているのなら、なぜまだ彼を救う方法を探しているのですか？」
languages.original_text: "If you keep forgetting the real Nuncius, why do you still seek a way to save him?"

traits.locale_text: 「ヌンキウスに関する情報を記憶から消しているのなら、なぜまだ彼を救う方法を探しているのですか？」
